Calls when a player equips armor.

Constructor for the ArmorEquipEvent.

The equip method of the item.

Identifies what armor a player has equipped.

B

A base item builder to build everything we need.

An empty constructor for when you want to populate options after creation.

A protected constructor to start off our item-stack process.

D

DEATH - Enum constant in enum class us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.events.armor.ArmorEquipEvent.EquipMethod
When you die causing all armor to unequip
DISPENSER - Enum constant in enum class us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.events.armor.ArmorEquipEvent.EquipMethod
When in range of a dispenser that shoots an armor piece to equip.
DRAG - Enum constant in enum class us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.events.armor.ArmorEquipEvent.EquipMethod
When you drag and drop the item to equip or unequip

HOTBAR - Enum constant in enum class us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.events.armor.ArmorEquipEvent.EquipMethod
